author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
e duṣṭa hṛdaye kāma⋅ādi ripu chaya
kuṭinaṭi, pratiṣṭhāśā, śāṭhya sadā raya

hṛdaya⋅śodhana āra kṛṣṇera vāsanā
nṛsiŋha⋅caraṇe more ei ta' kāmanā

kā̐diyā nṛsiŋha⋅pade māgiba kakhana
nirāpade navadvīpe jugala⋅bhajana

bhaya, bhaya pāya jā̐ra darśana, se hari
prasanna hoibe kabe more dayā kari’

jadyapi bhīṣaṇa mūrti duṣṭa jīva prati
prahlādādi kṛṣṇabhakta⋅jane bhadra ati

kabe vā prasanna ha’ye sakṛpā⋅vacane
nirbhaya karibe ei mūḍha akiñcane

‘svacchande voisa he vatsa, śrī⋅gaurāṅgadhāme
jugalabhajana hou, rati hou nāme

mama bhakta⋅kṛpābale vighna jābe dūra
śuddhacitte bhaja rādhā⋅kṛṣṇa⋅rasapura’

ei bali’ kabe mora mastaka⋅upara
svīya śrī⋅caraṇa harṣe dharive īśvara

amani jugalapreme sāttbika⋅vikāre
dharāya luṭiba āmi śrī⋅nṛsiŋha⋅dvāre
en_translation:
In this wicked heart, the six enemies such as lust, crookedness, the desire for fame, and deceit always reside.

My only prayer at the feet of Lord Nṛsiṁhadeva is for the purification of my heart and for a sincere desire to serve Lord Kṛṣṇa.

When will I weep at the feet of Lord Nṛsiṁhadeva and beg to safely perform the worship of the Divine Couple in Navadvīpa?

When will Lord Hari—whose very sight frightens even fear itself—be pleased and show mercy to me?

Although His form is terrifying toward wicked beings, He is extremely kind to devotees of Lord Kṛṣṇa like Prahlāda Mahārāja.

When, being pleased, will He make this foolish and insignificant soul fearless with His merciful words?

"Freely reside, O child, in the holy land of Lord Gaurāṅga. Let there be the worship of the Divine Couple, and let there be attachment to the Holy Name."

"By the mercy of My devotees, all obstacles will be removed. With a pure heart, worship Rādhā and Kṛṣṇa, the source of all nectar."

Saying this, when will the Lord happily place His own divine feet upon my head?

Then, with ecstatic transformations due to the love of the Divine Couple, I will roll on the ground at the door of Lord Nṛsiṁhadeva.
